name: wpfluent/wpfluent
description: WPFluent - The best framework to build WordPress plugins.
_comment: Autoload strategy: optimize-autoloader builds a fast classmap, but classmap-authoritative is OFF so the PSR-4 fallback still resolves classes not in the map. That lets a single /dev/ exclude keep the heavy test tooling (wp-browser + its vendor, test, factories, seeds, phpstan, etc.) out of the classmap and dumps warning-free, while FluentPlayer\Dev\ComposerScript (the post-install/update hook) still loads on demand via the FluentPlayer\Dev\ PSR-4 rule. This config governs local/dev dumps; build.sh re-dumps the release with --classmap-authoritative --no-dev and copies only the production paths (dev/ is omitted from that allowlist), so the shipped zip excludes dev/ and stays authoritative.
